basic_details.job_title: OAV Ainlachuan Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Warden, Head Cook and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Ainlachuan (OAV Ainlachuan) Support Staff for Boys' Hostel Notification 2026 has been released on the official website boudh.odisha.gov.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the OAV Ainlachuan Support Staff for Boys' Hostel Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.A./B.Sc. From any Recognized University, HSC Passed
qualification.details: Warden (Male): B.A./B.Sc. From any Recognized University Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper (Male): HSC Passed

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://boudh.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download OAV Ainlachuan Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.odisha_adarsha_vidyalaya_ainlachuan_oav_: B.A./B.Sc. From any Recognized University, HSC Passed

content_sections.heading: OAV Ainlachuan Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the OAV Ainlachuan Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download OAV Ainlachuan Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: OAV Ainlachuan Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Warden (Male): B.A./B.Sc. From any Recognized University Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper (Male): HSC Passed

rows.event: Last date of submission of Application Form

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://boudh.odisha.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OAV Ainlachuan Support Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the application form is 17 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Support Staff posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Support Staff for Boys' Hostel posts at Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Ainlachuan.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications vary by post. For Warden (Male), a B.A./B.Sc. is required. For Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper (Male), HSC passed is the requirement. Other posts may have different or no specific qualification mentioned.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for OAV Ainlachuan recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Support Staff positions?
faq.answer: The salaries vary for each post, ranging from ₹ 6,750.00 for Assistant Cook to ₹ 21,175.00 for Warden (Male).

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the organization, which is https://boudh.odisha.gov.in.

faq.question: Q8. What is the starting date for application submission?
faq.answer: The application process starts on 03 July 2026, and candidates can begin submitting their forms from this date onwards.

faq.question: Q9. Are these posts permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: The job type for these Support Staff positions is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for more information?
faq.answer: The official website for more information and to download the application form is https://boudh.odisha.gov.in.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the OAV Ainlachuan Support Staff recruitment?
